document.source_title: Aakash Chopra questions Mumbai Indians’ decision to give Bawa last over vs RCB

claims.claim_text: Aakash Chopra questioned Mumbai Indians' decision to give the last over to Raj Angad Bawa instead of Allah Ghazanfar.
claims.evidence_text: Former India player Aakash Chopra also questioned Mumbai’s decision of giving the ball to Bawa in the last over instead of Afghanistan’s Allah Ghazanfar who had an over left in his quota.

claims.claim_text: Mumbai Indians have been eliminated from the IPL play-offs.
claims.evidence_text: The Mumbai Indians were eliminated from the Indian Premier League (IPL) play-offs’ contention after their narrow 2-run defeat against the Royal Challengers Bengaluru.

entities.name: Mumbai Indians
entities.description: A professional cricket team based in Mumbai, India.
entities.evidence_text: The Mumbai Indians were eliminated from the Indian Premier League (IPL) play-offs’ contention.

entities.name: Raj Angad Bawa
entities.description: A relatively inexperienced cricketer who bowled the last over for Mumbai Indians.
entities.evidence_text: MI skipper Suryakumar Yadav gave the ball to the relative inexperienced Raj Angad Bawa.

entities.name: Allah Ghazanfar
entities.description: An Afghan cricketer who had an over left in his quota but was not used in the last over.
entities.evidence_text: Ghazanfar had one over left but you went with Raj Angad Bawa.

entities.name: Aakash Chopra
entities.description: Former Indian cricketer and commentator who criticized Mumbai's decision.
entities.evidence_text: Former India player Aakash Chopra also questioned Mumbai’s decision.

events.event: Mumbai Indians vs Royal Challengers Bengaluru
events.evidence_text: Mumbai Indians were eliminated from the Indian Premier League (IPL) play-offs’ contention after their narrow 2-run defeat against the Royal Challengers Bengaluru at Raipur.

timelines.milestone: Mumbai Indians eliminated from IPL play-offs
timelines.evidence_text: Mumbai Indians were eliminated from the Indian Premier League (IPL) play-offs’ contention after their narrow 2-run defeat.
